payload:
SOLE Research Loop — self-organizing experiment pipeline.

ARCHITECTURE: SOLE (Structurally Orthogonal Latent Experts). All-modules LoRA, rank-16.
STATE: Read .ralph/current_direction.md for active work. Read HYPOTHESES.yml for full roadmap.
CONTEXT: See VISION.md (architecture), FINDINGS.md (proven results).

HOW TO PICK WORK:
1. Read HYPOTHESES.yml
2. Find all `open` nodes whose `depends_on` are ALL satisfied (status `proven` or `supported`)
3. If your prompt specifies a SCALE CONSTRAINT (e.... [truncated, 2320 chars total]

exp_composition_health_kl_divergence: MATH.md + SPEC.md ready at macro/composition_health_kl_divergence/. KL divergence composition health monitor. Leave-one-out DeltaKL identifies harmful experts. 15min runtime, 20 calibration texts, N=[5,10,25,50]. Rewrite run_kl_health.py per SPEC.md.
task_id: run_kl_health_1773581246, experiment: composition_health_kl_divergence, script: macro/composition_health_kl_divergence/run_kl_health.py

node=exp_mixing_ratio_significance, scale=micro, title='Statistical significance of optimal data mixing ratio', deps_satisfied=true, notes='20 seeds Wilcoxon signed-rank test, alpha sweep 0.05 increments, CPU only'
hypothesis=exp_runtime_expert_loading, scale=micro, title='Hot-swap experts at runtime without model restart', priority=6, kill_criteria=['swap >100ms','quality regression vs cold-start']

exp_composition_health_kl_divergence KILLED: K1 rho=-0.7 (anti-correlated), K2 z=-2.97 (wrong direction), K3 ~45s (too slow). KL measures impact magnitude not quality. Same failure mode as cosine gating.

exp_composition_health_kl_divergence KILLED: KL measures impact magnitude not quality (rho=-0.7 anti-correlated). Consistent with cosine-gating kill. Review caveats: N=5 insufficient power, synthetic harm construction flawed, K3 is engineering not mechanism. Pending: research.start for exp_mixing_ratio_significance and exp_runtime_expert_loading (both micro).

exp_mixing_ratio_significance KILLED: Wilcoxon p=0.571 (threshold 0.05), Cohen d=-0.057, 8/20 seeds positive. Parent +11.2% mixing benefit was noise from 5 seeds. No ratio in 0.05-0.30 achieves significance. Bootstrap CI width=0.35 (threshold 0.15). Recommendation: pure real data for distillation.
hypothesis=exp_ppl_probe_k3_scaling, status=supported, K1_PASS=probe_oracle_r0.9979_at_K3, K2_NUANCED=K3_abs_gap_slightly_worse_but_probe_value_doubles, probe_improvement_scales_superlinearly_with_K

exp_silu_gamma_correction PROVEN: K1 PASS SiLU worst-case 1.41x (threshold 2.0x), K2 PASS max divergence from GELU 9.3% (threshold 50%). SiLU lower curvature (0.500 vs 0.798) makes it marginally safer. GELU safety bounds transfer to Qwen2.5/Llama. Tested 16 gamma profiles + scale sweep to d=256 N=50.

Batch integration: exp_mixing_ratio_significance KILL confirmed (p=0.571, pure real data), exp_ppl_probe_k3_scaling SUPPORTED (probe r=0.9979 at K=3, superlinear improvement), exp_silu_gamma_correction PROVEN (1.41x worst-case, 9.3% max divergence). consecutive_kills=0. exp_silu_vs_gelu_gamma_correction superseded.

exp_leave_one_out_expert_ranking: LOO PPL ranking for N=50 pilot adapters. SPEC at macro/leave_one_out_expert_ranking/SPEC.md. Subtraction approach, ~20min runtime. Also: exp_composition_dropout_robustness: bootstrap dropout test, 20 random 80% subsets. SPEC at macro/composition_dropout_robustness/SPEC.md. ~15min runtime. Both ready for experiment-programmer.

exp_leave_one_out_expert_ranking: task_id=run_leave_one_out_1773588863, subtraction approach, 60 hardcoded calibration texts, ~20min expected. exp_composition_dropout_robustness: task_id=run_dropout_robustness_1773588874, 4-bit NF4 fixed, ~10min expected. Queue: 4 tasks ahead (humaneval active + 3 pending).

exp_pilot50_composition_quality: K1 FAIL (127% mean degradation at N=5 equal-weight), K2 PASS, K3 PASS (all domains beat base). Composition works but equal-weight dilution severe. PAPER.md written. Queue: 1 active (humaneval) + 5 pending (ortho x2, clone_compete, LOO, dropout).

exp_pilot50_composition_quality: SUPPORTED. Equal-weight composition preserves gains over base (K3 PASS, 0/5 worse) but dilutes vs single-expert (K1 FAIL, 127% mean degradation, expected for 1/N). Composed PPL better than naive 1/N dilution — beneficial cross-domain transfer. PPL-probe weighting is known fix (r=0.990). Queue: 1 active (humaneval) + 5 pending.

exp_dynamic_weight_composition_macro: MATH.md + SPEC.md ready at macro/dynamic_weight_composition/. 5 strategies: equal-weight, top-k embed, PPL-probe weighted, cached-PPL matrix, hybrid embed+PPL. SNR analysis shows 1/49 dilution at N=50. Est runtime 60-90min A5000.

task_id: run_dynamic_weight_1773590554, experiment: exp_dynamic_weight_composition_macro, script: macro/dynamic_weight_composition/run_dynamic_weight.py, queued_behind: 5 tasks, completed_tasks: run_composition_quality_1773584052 (OK), run_kl_health_1773582154 (OK), run_kl_health_1773582050 (OK)
